text: A box company produces boxes in the shape of o sauare based rectangular prism x x They are making boxes that are 1000em™3 in capacity. If it costs them 0.02/cm™2 to produce the top and bottom Ard 0.03/cm™2 to produce the sides of the box; What should the dimensions of the box be so that it minimizes the cost? A(z) = 22° + 4zh C(z) = (2)(0.02)(z?) + 4(0.03)(z) (k) C(z) = (0.04)(2?) + (0.12) (=) (+2) C(z) = (0.04)(z%) + (£2) C'(x) = 0.08z — 120z 2 0=C'(z) z =11.45 Dimensions are: 11.45 x 11.45 x 7.63 The cost is C(11.45) = 15.72
